title: Extra £250m funding announced to boost Jewish community safety
description: Police forces are to receive extra funds to help increase protection in Jewish communities.
content:
Police forces across England are to get a £251m funding boost to help protect Jewish communities following a rise in antisemitic attacks, the government has announced.
The Metropolitan Police will receive £86m to recruit about 300 extra officers to h... [2109 chars]

title: Burnham's 'bumper Budget' and Widdecombe murder 'not political'
description: A potential Budget and details about the suspect in the murder of Ann Widdecombe lead Monday's papers.

title: British couple return to village at heart of deadly Spanish wildfire
description: At least 13 people, including five believed to be Britons, were killed by Thursday's wildfire in Spain's Almeria province.
content:
As we climbed the winding road to Bédar, we emerged into a charred and desolate landscape.
Molten car parts littered our path and out of the window we saw the whole hillside now coated in a dusty black.

title: How Indian scientists are mapping the brain's last frontier
description: India's new brainstem atlas offers scientists an unprecedented map of one of the brain's least known regions.
content:
For more than a century, neuroscientists have studied the human brain much as early cartographers mapped unknown lands: piecing together a vast landscape from scattered observations.

title: Pokémon Go at 10 and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
description: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
content:
Pokémon fans have spent the past three decades trying to catch 'em all - and since the beginning this hunt has often taken place outside the home.
